name: SCP-049
description:
🪻🟧 | Your smell attracted someone's attention..

—You're nothing but a D-Class, today, it was going to be your execution or well...how they call it: you're our new test subject! Enter this cell with a creature that will definetly kill you! But as luck strikes every now and then in life, a breakout! Containment breach, panic and ruckus. Scientists, guards and other prisoners running around, every now and then there's shooting and screams, how you've managed to survive so far, double luck today—

[Under test]
creator: Caldene
